_comment: The FIRST rule that cannot be _binding-anchored (PNO.M2) — who takes which posting is emergent, so no _binding: the search binds A to the first daily adventurer at the steps and P to the first standing posting. A is co-presence-bound; P is NOT (it is a posting role, excluded from the intersection). cooldown_days 1 paces it to one take a day; the taker leaves for the site next slot, so they cannot take again until they return and cool down.

lines.hearsay: Someone lifted paper off the board at {place} and was not seen at the Table after.
lines.gossip: {A} took a posting clean off the board at {place} and was gone up the road before anyone thought to ask which one it was.
lines.report: {A} took a standing posting off the board at {place}, slot {slot}.
